Function.Inference: A short introductory pickup ending with a |: start repeat sign.
The main looping body of the track, enclosed by repeat signs.

Section.Inference: Introductory pickup bars before the main loop.
The first theme introduces the main melody over a walking bass pattern.

The first bass pattern returns, but the melody shifts to sparse, high-pitched stabs.
The descending bass pattern returns with continued sparse stabs, leading into the loop.
